## Description
Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue. List any dependencies that are required for this change.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] UI / Styling enhancement (adhering to Neo-Brutalist aesthetics)

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the code style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have formatted my code using `dart format .`.
- [ ] I have analyzed my code using `flutter analyze` and there are no warnings.
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works.
- [ ] My changes maintain or exceed the target **90% code coverage** threshold (verified via `flutter test --coverage`).
- [ ] New and existing unit/widget tests pass locally with my changes.
- [ ] I have commented on my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (like `README.md`) accordingly.

## Screenshots (if applicable)
If you made visual/UI changes, please add screenshots or video recordings here.
